===== FILE: "C:\Users\fuji\Documents\Edenys\Proje‡Ćo\Projeto Final\presenca-qr\backend\node_modules\zod\v4\locales\ar.d.ts" =====  
import type * as errors from "../core/errors.js";
export default function (): {
    localeError: errors.$ZodErrorMap;
};
